name: Muhammad Fauzan Lubada
tagline: Specializing in the intersection of Web Development and Data Engineering.
aboutParagraphs: I am a highly motivated 6th-semester Informatics Engineering student at UIN Sunan Gunung Djati Bandung with a 3.83/4.00 GPA, specializing in the intersection of Web Development and Data Engineering.

I possess a proven track record of delivering end-to-end technical solutions—from developing full-stack web applications to deploying machine learning models—validated through rigorous industry programs like IBM SkillsBuild, Dicoding, and Samsung Innovation Campus.
I am driven by a continuous curiosity to explore emerging technologies, adapt to new frameworks, and collaborate on innovative, data-driven projects.

experience.title: Intern Full Stack AI Developer
experience.description: Developing and integrating full-stack AI solutions for enterprise applications.

experience.title: Cohort AI Engineer
experience.company: Pijak in Collaboration with IBM SkillsBuild
experience.description: Strengthened core software development and engineered four constraint-based recommendation models into MuterBandung—an intelligent tourism platform.

experience.title: Data & MLOps Graduate
experience.description: Advanced technical expertise across Data Analysis, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning. Collaborated on a capstone incorporating MLOps methodologies.

experience.title: IoT & Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Engineered AquaGuard IoT. Developed a Flask API, MongoDB Atlas routing, Ubidots dashboards, and 3D conceptual prototypes via Figma & Vectary 3D.

experience.title: Full Stack Web Developer
experience.description: Built a strong foundation in HTML, CSS, PHP logic, and progressed to advanced web development using Laravel framework.

education.institution: Universitas Islam Negeri Sunan Gunung Djati

education.description: Studied core science subjects while developing analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.

certifications.title: Gold Medal at NICYMS 2026
certifications.description: Developed a halal product traceability and auditing system on the Base L2 blockchain.
